    import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from utils.perceptron import Perceptron
    import numpy as np import matplotlib.pyplot as plt from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split from utils.perceptron import Perceptron
    In [2]:
    Copied! 
    RANDOM_SEED = 42
N = 1000
    RANDOM_SEED = 42 N = 1000
    In [3]:
    Copied! 
    np.random.seed(RANDOM_SEED)
classes = [0, 1]

mean = [[2,2], [5,5]]
sigma = [
    [
        [0.5,0],
        [0,0.5],
    ],
    [
        [0.5,0],
        [0,0.5],
    ]
]

label_features = []
label_class = []

for classe in classes:
    features = np.random.multivariate_normal(mean[classe], sigma[classe], size=N)

    label_features.append(features)
    label_class.append([classe] * N)
    np.random.seed(RANDOM_SEED) classes = [0, 1] mean = [[2,2], [5,5]] sigma = [ [ [0.5,0], [0,0.5], ], [ [0.5,0], [0,0.5], ] ] label_features = [] label_class = [] for classe in classes: features = np.random.multivariate_normal(mean[classe], sigma[classe], size=N) label_features.append(features) label_class.append([classe] * N)

    plt.scatter(label_features[0][:,0], label_features[0][:,1], label='0', alpha=0.8)
plt.scatter(label_features[1][:,0], label_features[1][:,1], label='1', alpha=0.8)
plt.title('Distribuição das Classes 0 e 1')
plt.xlabel('X')
plt.ylabel('Y')
plt.legend()
plt.show()
    plt.scatter(label_features[0][:,0], label_features[0][:,1], label='0', alpha=0.8) plt.scatter(label_features[1][:,0], label_features[1][:,1], label='1', alpha=0.8) plt.title('Distribuição das Classes 0 e 1') plt.xlabel('X') plt.ylabel('Y') plt.legend() plt.show()

    Copied! 
    np.random.seed(RANDOM_SEED)
weights = np.random.random(2)
bias = np.random.random(1)

print(f"Initial weights: {weights}")
print(f"Initial bias: {bias}")
    np.random.seed(RANDOM_SEED) weights = np.random.random(2) bias = np.random.random(1) print(f"Initial weights: {weights}") print(f"Initial bias: {bias}")
    Initial weights: [0.37454012 0.95071431]
Initial bias: [0.73199394]
    In [8]:
    Copied! 
    np.random.seed(RANDOM_SEED)
prcpt = Perceptron(x=X_train, y=y_train, weights=weights, bias=bias, eta=0.01, att_bias=True)
prcpt.train()
print("converged:", prcpt.converged, "epochs:", prcpt.epochs_run)
print("accuracy per epoch:", prcpt.accuracy_per_epoch)
print("updates per epoch:", prcpt.updates_per_epoch)
    np.random.seed(RANDOM_SEED) prcpt = Perceptron(x=X_train, y=y_train, weights=weights, bias=bias, eta=0.01, att_bias=True) prcpt.train() print("converged:", prcpt.converged, "epochs:", prcpt.epochs_run) print("accuracy per epoch:", prcpt.accuracy_per_epoch) print("updates per epoch:", prcpt.updates_per_epoch)
    converged: True epochs: 2
accuracy per epoch: [0.8557142857142856, 1.0]
updates per epoch: [202, 0]
    In [9]:
    Copied! 
    y_pred_full, acc_full = prcpt.predict(X_test=X, y_test=y)
print(f"Acurácia no dataset completo: {acc_full:.3f}")
    y_pred_full, acc_full = prcpt.predict(X_test=X, y_test=y) print(f"Acurácia no dataset completo: {acc_full:.3f}")
    Acurácia no dataset completo: 0.999
    In [10]:
    Copied! 
    w = prcpt.weights
b = float(np.squeeze(prcpt.bias))

x_min, x_max = X[:, 0].min() - 0.5, X[:, 0].max() + 0.5
xs = np.linspace(x_min, x_max, 400)
    w = prcpt.weights b = float(np.squeeze(prcpt.bias)) x_min, x_max = X[:, 0].min() - 0.5, X[:, 0].max() + 0.5 xs = np.linspace(x_min, x_max, 400)
    In [11]:
    Copied! 
    plt.figure(figsize=(7, 6))

if abs(w[1]) > 1e-12:
    ys = -(w[0] / w[1]) * xs - b / w[1]
    plt.plot(xs, ys, '--', linewidth=2, label="Fronteira de decisão", c='black')
else:
    x_v = -b / w[0]
    plt.axvline(x_v, linewidth=2, label="Fronteira de decisão", c='black', linestyle='--')

mis = (y_pred_full != y)

plt.scatter(
    X[~mis, 0], X[~mis, 1],
    c=y[~mis],
    cmap=plt.get_cmap("tab10", 2),
    marker="o", s=40, alpha=0.8,
    label="Corretos"
)

plt.scatter(
    X[mis, 0], X[mis, 1],
    c=y[mis],
    cmap=plt.get_cmap("tab10", 2),
    marker="x", s=70, alpha=0.9,
    label="Misclass"
)

plt.title(f"Perceptron — Fronteira e pontos (acc={acc_full:.2f})")
plt.xlabel("X1")
plt.ylabel("X2")
plt.legend()
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
    plt.figure(figsize=(7, 6)) if abs(w[1]) > 1e-12: ys = -(w[0] / w[1]) * xs - b / w[1] plt.plot(xs, ys, '--', linewidth=2, label="Fronteira de decisão", c='black') else: x_v = -b / w[0] plt.axvline(x_v, linewidth=2, label="Fronteira de decisão", c='black', linestyle='--') mis = (y_pred_full != y) plt.scatter( X[~mis, 0], X[~mis, 1], c=y[~mis], cmap=plt.get_cmap("tab10", 2), marker="o", s=40, alpha=0.8, label="Corretos" ) plt.scatter( X[mis, 0], X[mis, 1], c=y[mis], cmap=plt.get_cmap("tab10", 2), marker="x", s=70, alpha=0.9, label="Misclass" ) plt.title(f"Perceptron — Fronteira e pontos (acc={acc_full:.2f})") plt.xlabel("X1") plt.ylabel("X2") plt.legend() plt.tight_layout() plt.show()
    In [12]:
    Copied! 
    plt.figure(figsize=(6, 4))
plt.plot(np.arange(1, prcpt.epochs_run + 1), prcpt.accuracy_per_epoch, linewidth=2)
plt.xlabel("Época")
plt.ylabel("Acurácia (treino)")
plt.title("Acurácia por época")
plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
    plt.figure(figsize=(6, 4)) plt.plot(np.arange(1, prcpt.epochs_run + 1), prcpt.accuracy_per_epoch, linewidth=2) plt.xlabel("Época") plt.ylabel("Acurácia (treino)") plt.title("Acurácia por época") plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3) plt.tight_layout() plt.show()
